channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Obama Center visitors call project a symbol of 'Black excellence,' cite scandal-free legacy while criticizing Trump
item.description: Visitors at the opening of the Barack Obama Presidential Center praised his legacy as 'Black excellence' and contrasted it with divisions under President Trump.

item.title: Trump's energy policy keeps oil under $80 despite Iran tensions
Sen. Graham predicts Iran MOU will fail, US will seize Hormuz
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham predicted Sunday that the U.S.-Iran framework agreement will collapse and that President Trump is prepared to seize the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Corbett-Dillon to Newsmax: Trump may push UK's Starmer to resign
item.description: British political strategist Thomas Corbett-Dillon told Newsmax on Sunday that UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer appears determined to stay in office despite pressure.
